name: day-trading-mnq-mgc
description: Prepare an explicit, user-requested intraday MNQ or MGC futures plan using current market context, levels, catalysts, scenarios, invalidation, and risk controls. Use only when directly named or requested; never auto-invoke for general finance questions or present a setup as guaranteed advice.

resources.description: Five-minute NY open prep workflow for urgent MNQ/MGC chart + news + levels requests.
Observed Sunday Nasdaq/NQ weekly prep workflow: web-search current futures, key levels, catalysts, and scenario-based bias without overclaiming live precision.
